_comment: E2E-only emulator config (workspace firebase.json stays untouched): same auth/firestore ports and rules, but explicit IPv4 hosts and no Emulator UI — this environment has no IPv6, and the UI's ::1 port check would otherwise abort startup.
_comment2: The rules/indexes below are copies of the canonical workspace files, refreshed into .emulators/ by global-setup on every run (the CLI rejects paths outside the config's directory).
